channel.title: Frontend on mo11om
channel.description: Recent content in Frontend on mo11om

item.title: NCTU Plus Frontend
item.author: user@example.com (Hugo Author)
item.description: The Problem The NCTU Plus frontend is a React SPA for NYCU students to browse and post course reviews. Authentication is entirely backend-owned: the Go API handles the NYCU OAuth redirect and sets an httpOnly JWT cookie. The frontend never touches tokens directly — it can only probe session state by calling the API. This shapes every auth-related decision: there is no login form, no token storage, no logout handler on the client side.
